title: Lillehammer, Innlandet — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lillehammer, Innlandet: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lillehammer is a city in Innlandet with a population of 28,000. A mountain town famous for hosting the 1994 Winter Olympics, known for its ski resorts and Maihaugen museum.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
